name: Impatriate regime with minor children in Lazio
description: Expat with impatriate regime and minor children earning €80,000 in Lazio (Rome), enhanced 60% exemption. INPS contributions are deducted from gross first, then impatriate percentage applied to reduced amount.

sources.description: Impatriate regime 2026: 60% of income exempt for workers with minor children. INPS deducted from gross before exemption calculation.
Benefits from 2026 reduced IRPEF second bracket (33% vs 35%).
